mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, ai_personality_code, personality_strength_code, create_time, update_time, is_valid, is_deleted FROM ai_personality_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_valid = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY ai_personality_code DESC, create_time LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_personality_config SET ai_personality_code = #{aiPersonalityCode}, personality_strength_code = #{personalityStrengthCode}, is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE ai_personality_config SET is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE ai_personality_config SET is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, ai_personality_code, personality_strength_code, create_time, update_time, is_valid, is_deleted FROM ai_personality_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
